values.name: reasoning_summary
values.stringValue: ={{ typeof $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message.content).reasoning_summary : ($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content?.reasoning_summary || $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.reasoning_summary || 'Fallback: Context parsing exception under current n8n model node configuration.') }}

values.name: prediction_summary
values.stringValue: ={{ typeof $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message.content).prediction_summary : ($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content?.prediction_summary || $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.prediction_summary || 'Fallback: Operational impact computation metrics unavailable.') }}

values.name: recommended_action
values.stringValue: ={{ typeof $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message.content).recommended_action : ($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content?.recommended_action || $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.recommended_action || 'Fallback: Default escalation protocols enforced.') }}

values.name: severity_score
values.numberValue: ={{ typeof $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message.content).severity_score : ($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content?.severity_score || $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.severity_score || 50.00) }}

values.name: confidence_score
values.numberValue: ={{ typeof $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message.content).confidence_score : ($node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.message?.content?.confidence_score || $node["OpenAI: Brain Decision"].json.confidence_score || 80.00) }}

parameters.query:
=DECLARE @new_decision_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = NEWID();

INSERT INTO ai_decisions (
  decision_id, signal_id, entity_id, reasoning_summary, prediction_summary, 
  recommended_action, severity_score, confidence_score, decision_status, 
  delete_flag, record_version, structured_json_output
)
VALUES (
  @new_decision_id,
  '{{ $node["SQL: Ingest Signal"].json.signal_id }}',
  '{{ $node["SQL: Hydrate Memory"].json.entity_id }}',
  '{{ $json.reasoning_summary }}',
  '{{ $json.prediction_summary }}',
  '{{ $json.recommended_action }}',
  {{ $json.severity_score }},
  {{ $json.confidence_score }},
  'OPEN',
  'N',
  1,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'
);

SELECT @new_decision_id AS decision_id;

parameters.subject: =EDNS Alert: Execution Target Triggered (Severity: {{$node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.severity_score}})
parameters.html:
=

EDNS Executive Decision Brief

Status: OPEN

Target Asset: {{$node["SQL: Hydrate Memory"].json.entity_name}} (Code: {{$node["SQL: Hydrate Memory"].json.entity_code}})

Applied Rule: {{$node["SQL: Hydrate Memory"].json.business_rule_applied}}

Reasoning: {{$node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.reasoning_summary}}

Prediction: {{$node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.prediction_summary}}

Action: {{$node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.recommended_action}}

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO action_history (decision_id, target_system, action_type, execution_status, retry_count, response_payload, delete_flag, record_version)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["SQL: Commit Decision"].json.decision_id }}',
  'Email_API',
  'Escalation',
  'SUCCESS',
  0,
  'Notification successfully routed to enterprise operations team endpoint.',
  'N',
  1
);

=INSERT INTO ai_telemetry (decision_id, model_name, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, execution_latency_ms, estimated_cost_usd, delete_flag, record_version)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["SQL: Commit Decision"].json.decision_id }}',
  'gpt-4o',
  {{ $node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.telemetry_prompt_tokens }},
  {{ $node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.telemetry_completion_tokens }},
  {{ $node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.telemetry_latency_ms }},
  {{ $node["Set: Normalize AI Output"].json.telemetry_cost_usd }},
  'N',
  1
);
